description: 12-email lead follow-up sequence across 3 tiers (Hot/Warm/Cold). Hot leads get 3 emails on Days 1/3/5 focused on closing. Warm leads get 3 emails on Days 2/5/10 focused on differentiation and social proof. Cold leads get 4 emails on Days 3/7/14/30 focused on education, trust-building, and a graceful close.

hot.description: High-scoring leads who recently requested a quote. Goal: close fast with urgency and trust signals.
hot.scoring_criteria: Lead score >= 70, quote requested within last 48 hours

warm.description: Leads showing interest but haven't committed. Goal: differentiate, build trust, create FOMO.
warm.scoring_criteria: Lead score 40-69, visited site or opened previous email

cold.description: Low-engagement leads in long consideration. Goal: educate, build authority, stay top of mind, close gracefully.

emails.subject_b: {{first_name}}, we just finished putting together your quote
emails.preview_text: Fair pricing, no surprises. Here's everything you need to know.
emails.headline: Your Quote Is Ready, {{first_name}}
emails.subheadline: Fair pricing, no hidden fees, and a team that shows up when they say they will.
emails.body_html:
Hey {{first_name}},

Thanks for reaching out to TotalGuard. We appreciate you trusting us with your yard, and we don't take that lightly.

We've put together your quote and it's ready for you to review. Here's what you can expect from us:

  • Flat-rate pricing — The number you see is the number you pay. No hidden fees, no surprise charges, no "well, actually" after the job is done.
  • 24-hour quote response — We got back to you fast because we respect your time. (Most of our quotes go out within 2 hours.)
  • Same crew, every single visit — Your team learns your property, your preferences, and your standards. No random strangers showing up.
  • 100% satisfaction guarantee — If something isn't right, we come back and fix it. Period.
{{#if requested_service}}

You mentioned you're interested in {{requested_service}} — that's one of our most popular services in {{city}}, and our crew has handled hundreds of properties just like yours across the Madison area.

{{/if}}

The numbers speak for themselves: 4.9 stars on Google, 78+ verified reviews, and 500+ properties served across the Madison area. We're not the cheapest, and we're not the most expensive — we're the most reliable.

Click below to view your quote and lock in your spot on our schedule. If you have any questions at all, just reply to this email or give us a call. We're real people and we actually pick up the phone.

review.text: Fastest quote I've ever received on a job, they went around my house once and gave me a great price almost instantly!
review.name: Luke Field

emails.urgency_text: Your dedicated crew is ready. Let's get your yard looking its best.
emails.goal: Get the lead to open their quote and book. Emphasize trust, speed, and no-surprises pricing.

emails.subject_b: Did you get a chance to look at your quote?
emails.preview_text: Just checking in — wanted to make sure everything made sense.
emails.headline: Quick Check-In, {{first_name}}
emails.subheadline: No pressure — just making sure you have everything you need.
emails.body_html:
Hey {{first_name}},

Just wanted to follow up on the quote we sent over. Did you have a chance to take a look?

If anything was unclear or you have questions about the pricing, the process, or what's included — I'm happy to walk through it. Seriously, no question is too small. We'd rather over-explain than leave you guessing.

{{#if requested_service}}

Quick tip for your {{requested_service}}: This time of year in {{city}}, the best results come from getting on a regular schedule early. Properties that start service in the spring tend to look noticeably better by mid-summer compared to those that wait. Just something to keep in mind — no pressure either way.

{{/if}}

Here's what I want you to know: there's absolutely no obligation. We don't do high-pressure sales. We don't send pushy follow-ups. We just want to make sure you got the information you need to make the best decision for your yard.

If the timing isn't right, that's totally fine. But if you're ready to move forward, we can usually get you on the schedule within a few days.

Just hit reply or give us a call at (608) 535-6057. We're here to help.

review.text: Showed up when they said they would, explained everything clearly, and didn't try to upsell anything. The work was done right.
review.name: Zachary Butterfield

emails.urgency_text: No obligation. No pressure. Just honest yard care when you're ready.
emails.goal: Casual, low-pressure check-in. Answer objections before they're raised. Position as helpful, not salesy.

emails.subheadline: Seasonal demand is picking up. We wanted to give you a heads up before pricing adjusts.
emails.body_html:
Hey {{first_name}},

Just a quick heads up — the quote we put together for you expires this Friday. After that, we'll need to requote, and with seasonal demand picking up across {{city}}, pricing may adjust.

This isn't a pressure tactic. It's just how the business works: as our schedule fills up, we have to adjust pricing to reflect the demand on our crews. Right now, we can still honor the original quote.

Here's a reminder of what you'll get:

  • Same dedicated crew every visit — they'll learn your yard inside and out
  • Service confirmation text before every visit — no surprises
  • Before & after photos so you can see the results
  • 100% satisfaction guarantee — if it's not right, we come back
  • Direct line to the owners (Vance & Alex) — not a call center

We've served 500+ properties across Madison, Middleton, Waunakee, Monona, and the surrounding areas. Our 4.9-star rating on Google isn't an accident — it's what happens when you care about every single yard like it's your own.

If you're ready, click below to book at your current quote price. If you need a few more days, just reply and we'll see what we can do.

review.text: Very professional and easy to work with. Communication was clear, pricing was fair, and the results were solid. Our lawn hasn't looked this clean in a long time.
review.name: Peter Meyer

emails.subject_b: A few things about TotalGuard you might not know
emails.preview_text: Here's what makes us different from every other lawn company in {{city}}.
emails.headline: What Makes TotalGuard Different
emails.subheadline: We're not like every other lawn company. Here's why that matters for your yard.
emails.body_html:
Hey {{first_name}},

If you're still thinking about who to trust with your yard in {{city}}, we get it. There are a lot of options out there, and most of them sound the same.

So here's what actually makes TotalGuard different — not marketing fluff, but real things you'll notice from day one:

Same Crew, Every Single Visit

Most lawn companies send whoever is available. That means a different crew every time, none of whom know your property, your preferences, or your problem areas. At TotalGuard, you get the same dedicated team every visit. They learn your yard. They remember that you like the edges extra clean, or that the back corner needs extra attention. Consistency is how quality happens.

Owner-Operated, Not a Franchise

When you hire TotalGuard, you're working directly with Vance and Alex — the founders. We're not a franchise with a call center. If you have a question, you text us directly. If something isn't right, we personally make it right. That's a level of accountability a big company can never match.

24-Hour Quote Response

We know your time is valuable. When you reach out, you'll hear back within 24 hours — usually within 2. No waiting around for days wondering if someone got your message.

100% Satisfaction Guarantee

We stand behind every single job. If you're not happy with the results, we come back and fix it at no extra charge. No arguments, no excuses. We've served 500+ properties and maintained a 4.9-star Google rating because we take this seriously.

Flat, Transparent Pricing

The quote you get is the price you pay. We don't lowball to get in the door and then hit you with add-ons. What you see is what you get.

Still have questions? Just reply to this email. We're real people, and we'd love to help.

emails.subject_a: 3 lawn care mistakes most {{city}} homeowners make
emails.subject_b: Free lawn care guide for {{city}} homeowners
emails.preview_text: Quick tips from a pro — whether you hire us or not.
emails.headline: 3 Mistakes Most {{city}} Homeowners Make
emails.subheadline: Free advice from the pros — whether you hire us or not, your yard will thank you.
emails.body_html:
Hey {{first_name}},

We talk to hundreds of {{city}} homeowners every season, and the same three mistakes come up again and again. These are easy to fix, and your yard will look noticeably better within weeks — whether you hire us or not.

Mistake #1: Mowing Too Short

It's tempting to cut the grass really short so you don't have to mow as often. But in Wisconsin, scalping your lawn is one of the worst things you can do. Short grass exposes the soil to direct sunlight, which dries it out and gives weeds room to move in. The ideal mowing height for most Madison-area lawns is 3 to 3.5 inches. Taller grass shades the soil, retains moisture, and naturally crowds out weeds.

Mistake #2: Watering at the Wrong Time

If you're watering your lawn in the evening, you're setting yourself up for fungal diseases. The grass stays wet all night, creating a breeding ground for problems. Water between 6am and 10am — early enough that the grass has time to dry before nightfall, but not so late that the midday sun evaporates everything before it soaks in. Aim for 1 inch of water per week, including rainfall.

Mistake #3: Ignoring Your Edges

A freshly mowed lawn with messy edges looks worse than an overgrown lawn with clean edges. Seriously — edging is the single biggest visual impact per minute of work. Clean edges along sidewalks, driveways, and garden beds make the entire property look manicured and intentional. It's the difference between "maintained" and "cared for."

Bonus tip: Leave your grass clippings on the lawn after mowing. They break down quickly and return valuable nitrogen to the soil. It's free fertilizer, and it's better for your lawn than bagging.

Hope that helps, {{first_name}}. We genuinely love helping people take better care of their yards — it's why we got into this business.

If you ever want a hand with the heavy lifting, we're always here.

review.text: TotalGuard Lawn Service has been nothing short of outstanding! From the very first interaction, their proactive communication and reliability stood out.
review.name: Susan McBryde

Hey {{first_name}},

I'll keep this short, because I know your inbox is busy and the last thing you need is another company that won't stop emailing you.

This is our last follow-up.

We're not going to keep filling your inbox with reminders. You know who we are, you know what we do, and you'll reach out when the timing is right. We respect that.

But before we go, here's what we want you to remember about TotalGuard:

  • We're local. Madison-born, owner-operated by Vance and Alex. Not a franchise, not a call center.
  • We're reliable. 4.9 stars on Google, 78+ reviews, 500+ properties served. Same crew every visit.
  • We're honest. Flat pricing, no upsells, no hidden fees. The quote is the price.
  • We guarantee our work. If it's not right, we come back. No questions asked.

Whenever you're ready — whether it's next week, next month, or next spring — here's how to reach us:

Phone: (608) 535-6057

Email: totalguardllc@gmail.com

Website: tgyardcare.com

Get a Quote: tgyardcare.com/contact

One last thing: If you'd still like to hear from us occasionally with seasonal lawn care tips and advice (no sales pitches, just genuinely useful stuff), you can stay on our tips list below. Otherwise, we'll stop here.

Thanks for considering TotalGuard, {{first_name}}. We hope to work with you someday.

Take care,
Vance & Alex
TotalGuard Yard Care
